channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A single protein may be holding back CAR T cancer therapy
item.description: A newly identified protein, NFIL3, may be a major obstacle for CAR T-cell therapy, causing engineered immune cells to fail.

item.title: This blood-feeding fly sacrifices its sight after finding a host
item.description: Deer keds rely on flight and vision to find a host, but after landing and shedding their wings, they reduce their eyesight.

item.title: Social decisions begin in the brain before conscious awareness
item.description: Research on zebrafish shows social behavior starts with coordinated brain activity before any visible movement occurs.

item.title: A stellar 'Rosetta stone' reveals the source of mysterious cosmic signals
item.description: Astronomers have solved the mystery behind a class of repeating cosmic signals using Australian telescopes.
